creator: mrspock@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
Image Magick 4.0.2 is not working properly.
It seems to need a library:  "libttf"

Trying to compile ImageMagick from CVS Repository is useless also.
The package does not compile fine. There seems to be an "include" 
file that is not located in a proper place.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 2.2.6
Install ImageMagick.4.0.2.tgz using pkg_add
